params.name: Phial of Galadrial
params.description:
On Jan 3, 1132 AD, the Starglass was gifted to a guest from a faraway land.
The fairy queen crafted this crystal phial as a gift for a brave man. It holds the light of the stars and radiates a perpetual glow, keeping dark and evil forces at bay.
